error_message: Registry System v1.5 missing internal meeting block definitions (B40-B48)

details.issue: block_type_registry.json v1.5 references INTERNAL_STANDUP_COFOUNDER, INTERNAL_STANDUP_TEAM, and INTERNAL_STRATEGIC stakeholder types but does not define the B40-B48 blocks needed to process them
details.recommendation: Complete block_type_registry.json with B40-B48 definitions or create separate internal meeting processing workflow
